# hetzner_server_addon (Resource)

Orders an addon for a Hetzner dedicated server (e.g. primary_ipv4).



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `product_id` (String) The addon product ID (e.g. "primary_ipv4").
- `server_number` (Number) The server number to add the addon to.

### Read-Only

- `status` (String) The transaction status.
- `transaction_id` (String) The order transaction ID.
